info.title: Copper CRM API
info.description: The Copper Developer API provides a RESTful interface with JSON-formatted responses to access CRM resources including leads, people, companies, opportunities, projects, tasks, and activities. All requests require HTTPS with TLS 1.2+. Rate limited to 180 requests per minute.

copperAuth.name: X-PW-AccessToken
copperAuth.description: API Key. Also requires X-PW-Application: developer_api and X-PW-UserEmail headers.
